pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 29 - file is generated with synthetic GPS point data
setup_task.sh line 10 - file is generated with synthetic road network data
export_result.sh line 9 - expected output file location
Parsed setup_task.sh lines 35-40: noisy_gps_points.geojson contains exactly 6 Point features with IDs 1-6

verifier.py line 29 uses this value as max_allowed_dist threshold for snapping accuracy check. export_result.sh line 109 uses same threshold to detect movement. Represents ~0.11cm tolerance at equator.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic GeoJSON data generated within setup_task.sh. Input contains 6 GPS points with slight offsets from a 2-line road network. Expected output is snapped points at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/snapped_points.geojson. All file paths and expected_count=6 are verified against the generation script. The max_allowed_distance_deg tolerance of 1e-6 degrees (~0.11cm) is used to verify snapping accuracy in the verifier.
